vision_report.narrative_description: The botanical audit reveals a catastrophic loss of the original registry. The desk environment currently hosts empty pots and a single, unidentified sprout. The white rabbit anchor remains in P3, but the Pothos is gone. The presence of eggshells suggests an attempt at soil amendment or pest control, but the primary specimens have failed to thrive or have been removed.
